title: Al Munadi offline cache
description: Shape of the cached last-successful fetch. Written after every successful fetch; read when the network is unavailable. Loaders must treat a missing or malformed cache as 'no cache' (never crash). A cache without 'times' is invalid.

times.description: Five prayer times as HH:MM strings, in order: Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha. These are the raw mosque times; manual offsets are applied at display time, never persisted into the cache.

iqama.description: Raw iqama values per prayer as Mawaqit provides them: either an absolute HH:MM or a +N minutes offset string.

jumua.description: Jumuah time HH:MM. On Fridays it replaces Dhuhr in display and notifications.

jumua2.description: Second Jumuah time, shown separately on Fridays when present.

hijri_date.description: Preformatted Hijri date, e.g. '24 Dhu al-Hijjah 1447 AH'.

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) on which the cache was written.
